locale_profile.note: Korean (`values-ko`) is a standard Korean localization for Android UI, playback, and signal-visualization text.
locale_profile.identity_rule: Treat this locale as contemporary Korean UI localization. Avoid literal English word order in strings about playback speed, input rules, byte counts, token lyrics, and low/high bit visualization. Preserve WaveBits protocol tokens such as mini, flash, pro, ultra, ASCII, UTF-8, Hex, Binary, Morse, Hz, payload, token, byte, and nibble when the existing Korean locale keeps them as technical terms.
locale_profile.app_text_rule: For app UI text, keep labels concise enough for Android buttons, tabs, segmented controls, mini-player sheets, sliders, and narrow cards. Follow existing project terms where present: 오디오, 자, 바이트, 입력 규칙, 토큰, 니블, 페이로드, 낮은 캐리어, 높은 캐리어, 레인, 에너지, and 피치. Use compact Korean labels rather than full explanatory sentences for controls and mode chips. Keep protocol tokens and ASCII/UTF-8/Morse terms stable.
locale_profile.sample_text_rule: For built-in sample prose, preserve the dramatic audio-signal atmosphere while writing fluent Korean. Keep pro-mode sample strings strict ASCII when the key or context says pro/ASCII.
locale_profile.key_alignment_rule: When filling missing entries, write Korean localization that matches the current XML terminology. Avoid English-like sentence structure unless the string is intentionally a protocol token or fixed ASCII sample. For missing compact input summaries, preserve placeholders and mirror the established counter pattern around `%1$d자 • %2$d바이트`.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_fever_shared_as_bread
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: Come closer. The fever is warm enough for us all.
entries.localized: 이리 가까이 오렴. 열병은 우리 모두를 덥혀주고도 남을 만큼 따스하단다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_kind_contagion_gathers_family
entries.en: The smiling caretaker anointed each captive brow with golden pus, bidding them welcome. Around him, the sick embraced, coughing red into one another\'s sleeves and laughing through cracked blisters—for no one had to shiver alone anymore. Even the gentle dead carried new arrivals carefully through the marsh. To loving ears, their cries sounded like joy finally finding a home.
entries.localized: 자애롭게 미소 짓는 관리인은 포로들의 이마마다 황금빛 고름을 발라주며 환영의 인사를 건넸다. 그 주위에서 병자들은 서로의 소매에 붉은 피를 토해내면서도 서로를 끌어안았고, 더 이상 홀로 떨지 않아도 된다는 사실에 갈라진 물집 사이로 웃음을 터뜨렸다. 온화한 망자들조차 새로 도착한 이들을 조심스럽게 안아 늪지 너머로 옮겨주었다. 자애로운 귀에는 그들의 비명조차 마침내 안식처를 찾은 자들의 환희처럼 들렸다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_rust_bell_in_fog
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: A dull bell tolls in the fog; polished armor remembers dust
entries.localized: 안개 속에서 둔탁한 종소리가 울려 퍼지고, 매끄럽게 닦인 갑옷은 자신이 한낱 먼지였음을 기억해 낸다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_patient_rain_takes_the_wall
entries.en: The bell does not hurry. With each breath of fog, the wall sheds another pale scale; with each patient drop of acid rain, proud alloy reddens, crumbles, and forgets the shape it defended. Gears unclench inside their casings. Towers lean without protest. Rivers dry into a crust of old poison. Build higher if you wish. Time owns the ladder, the stone, and the hand that lifts them.
entries.localized: 종은 결코 서두르지 않는다. 안개가 한 번 숨을 쉴 때마다 성벽은 창백한 비늘을 하나씩 벗어 던지고, 끈질기게 떨어지는 산성비에 오만했던 합금은 붉게 녹슬며 바스러져 자신이 지키고자 했던 형태마저 잊어버린다. 외피 속에서 톱니바퀴들이 긴장을 푼다. 탑들은 아무런 저항 없이 기울어진다. 강물은 오래된 독의 찌꺼기만 남긴 채 말라붙는다. 원한다면 어디 한번 더 높이 쌓아 보아라. 시간은 사다리와 돌, 그리고 그것을 들어 올리는 손마저 이미 소유하고 있으니.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_mushrooms_from_empty_eyes
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: From empty eyes, bright mushrooms sprout like a grateful spring
entries.localized: 텅 빈 눈동자에서 반가운 봄인 양 화사한 버섯이 피어난다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_harvest_beneath_the_flowers
entries.en: How generous the fallen field has become. Yellow-green spores roll through the mist, fat white grubs turn the soil, and the great slime mold beats softly under the blossoms like a borrowed heart. Beneath the sweet flowers lie the old bodies, no longer wasted, no longer alone. Every rib is a cradle, every wound a seedbed, and every quiet soldier a banquet for a million smaller lives.
entries.localized: 스러진 자들의 들판은 이토록 관대해졌다. 안개 속으로 황록색 포자가 구르듯 퍼져나가고, 살진 하얀 구더기들이 흙을 일구며, 거대한 점균류가 꽃들 아래서 마치 빌려온 심장처럼 부드럽게 고동친다. 달콤한 꽃송이들 밑에는 오래된 유해들이 누워 있으니, 그들은 더 이상 버려진 것도, 외로운 것도 아니다. 모든 갈비뼈는 요람이 되고, 모든 상처는 모종판이 되며, 말 없는 병사들은 수백만 마리의 작은 생명들을 위한 성찬이 된다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_warm_mire_stillness
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: The warm mire softly closes, and cries for help fade into silence
entries.localized: 따스한 진흙탕이 부드럽게 입을 닫고, 살려달라는 비명은 침묵 속으로 잠겨든다.

entries.name: audio_sample_immortal_rot_themed_shield_sinks_from_hand
entries.en: Breathe slowly now. The shield is heavy because it has served enough, and the severed arm aches only until you understand it is finally free. Rust stills the weapon, fog thickens in the lungs, and every order to stand sounds farther away than sleep. Let the mud hold what you cannot carry. When the will to fight loosens, despair becomes the softest bed in the world.
entries.localized: 자, 이제 천천히 숨을 쉬어 보아라. 방패가 무거운 것은 이미 제 몫을 다했기 때문이고, 잘려 나간 팔의 통증은 네가 마침내 자유로워졌음을 깨달을 때까지만 아플 뿐이란다. 녹은 무기를 잠재우고, 안개는 폐를 가득 채우니, 일어서라는 명령은 아득한 잠결보다 더 멀게만 들려온다. 네가 감당할 수 없는 짐은 진흙이 품게 내버려 두어라. 싸우려는 의지가 스러질 때, 절망은 세상에서 가장 포근한 요람이 되는 법이니.

style_profile.prompt_text:
# KO Sample Global Guardrails

Apply these rules to all Korean sample-text faction profiles under `values-ko`.

1. Output register baseline
- Default narration must use plain declarative style (`-다/-ㄴ다`), not polite UI register.
- Never use `-습니다/입니다` or `-요` unless a specific profile explicitly allows an exception.

2. Technical and formatting safety
- Keep Android placeholders unchanged: `%1$s`, `%2$d`, `%%`, etc.
- Do not introduce raw backslash escapes such as `\"`, `\'`, or malformed `\u` sequences in XML text.
- Use XML-safe quoting (`"`) when literal double quotes are required.

3. Consistency discipline
- Preserve recurring faction lexicon and command cadence inside each profile.
- Keep non-target-language guidance in English; keep only necessary Korean grammar anchors.

---

# KO Sample Style: The Immortal Rot

Use this profile only for `sample_text`, locale `ko`, group `immortal_rot`.

1. Voice and cadence
- Narrative description should stay in plain declarative style (`-다/-ㄴ다`).
- Keep sentence rhythm slow and heavy, like mud flowing and settling.
- Never use polite endings such as `-습니다` or `-요`.

2. Speaking register for direct lines
- For calls, whispers, or direct address, use elder-like coaxing tone:
  `-렴`, `-단다`, `-어라`.
- Keep a split between tenderness and dread; the line should sound warm and terrifying at once.

3. Positive warmth over disgusting visuals
- Preserve imagery of fungus, pus, vomit, rust, and decay, but pair it with warm and affirmative diction.
- Frame rot as vitality, and despair as rest.
- Favor phrasing that feels comforting while describing corruption.

4. Verb preference (release, surrender, sleep)
- Prefer verbs that imply loosening, yielding, relief, and drifting to sleep.
- For corroded metal or dying flesh, avoid heroic resistance verbs.
- Suggested direction:
  - “gear falls apart” -> “gear relaxes its tension”
  - “weapon rusts” -> “rust lulls the weapon into sleep”
  - “despair becomes bed” -> “the warmest cradle in the world”
